# Backend Agent

_Last updated: 2026-04-02_

## Status

No backend is planned for NEON DEFENDER unless explicitly instructed.

## Planned Stack (Phase 3 — do not implement without explicit instruction)

- None (frontend-only by default)

## Rules

- Do not scaffold a backend unless explicitly instructed.
- Do not introduce real API keys or credentials into the codebase.
